channel.title: Pure and Applied Chemistry
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Pure and Applied Chemistry

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Carlos Alberto da Silva Júnior, Gildo Girotto Júnior, Carla Morais, Dosil Pereira de Jesus DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Glossary of terms for mass and volume in analytical chemistry (IUPAC Recommendations 2024)
item.description: Article by Carlos Alberto da Silva Júnior, Gildo Girotto Júnior, Carla Morais, Dosil Pereira de Jesus DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2023-0903

item.title: Toward a definition of valence as a quantity (IUPAC Technical Report)
item.description: Article by Carlos Alberto da Silva Júnior, Gildo Girotto Júnior, Carla Morais, Dosil Pereira de Jesus DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2023-0402

item.title: Corrigendum to: Green chemistry for all: three principles of Inclusive Green and Sustainable Chemistry Education
item.description: Article by Carlos Alberto da Silva Júnior, Gildo Girotto Júnior, Carla Morais, Dosil Pereira de Jesus DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-2008
